static_analysis.capacitor_plugin: Native BackgroundLocation plugin (LocationPlugin.java) wraps LocationService; no @capacitor/geolocation pkg; web fallback uses navigator.geolocation with enableHighAccuracy:true and 10-15s timeouts
static_analysis.location_service_java: Foreground service starts cleanly on SDK 34+. Permission gate at line 243 prevents crash. JWT cached in SharedPreferences (hyeni_location_prefs), refreshed every 50min. Three-tier upload retry: user JWT -> refreshed JWT -> anon key. Kalman filter + stationary detection (5s moving / 30s stationary). Last coordinates persisted for ShutdownReceiver replay.
static_analysis.validation: Client: saveLocationHistoryRows uses Number.isFinite gate only (no range check). Server: upsert_child_location and record_location_history_rows RPCs lack lat/lng CHECK. Native: handleLocation rejects accuracy > 50m only.
static_analysis.masking: No raw lat/lng written to console/logcat. LocationService logs accuracy + stationary flags at Log.d/Log.i but never the coords themselves.
